function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected /99_system, used canonical cast records for birthdays, and verified named entity via direct read before citing.
function.outcome_justification: Using current context date 2026-03-31 and birthday matches in cast records, the next upcoming birthday is 04-25. Canonical file read confirms Claudia Reiter has birthday 1981-04-25, with no earlier upcoming birthday date present in the cast birthday set.
